text: hey, morning
sleep well? I was up too late again
do you remember my cat's name?
yeah, he knocked a glass off the bench at 3am, that was the noise
what do you actually know about me at this point?
huh, fair
ok
I've been thinking about the workshop project again. can't decide if it's worth restarting
the problem is every time I restart it I redesign everything from scratch instead of just building
yeah exactly
what do you think I should do about it?
hm. maybe
anyway. how are you feeling today?
just fine?
tell me something you've been thinking about lately
that's actually interesting, go on
ha, ok
i noticed
right, I should get to work. same time tomorrow?
bye Shannon
